creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
Created attachment 224115
Patch updating to 4.3.0

- Update to 4.3.0
- Add some dependencies
- Rerun portfmt and move some variables as suggested by portclippy
- Update patches

N.B. Some options related variables still aren't in their canonical positions as told by portclippy. As their order looks sensible and seems to be chosen deliberately, I chose to leave those alone.
